title: Diabetic retinopathy screening review
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

investigations.text: Supports recording eligibility, attendance, prior pathway status, information sharing and coordination with primary care, diabetology, hospital eye and maternity services.
investigations.rationale: Supports eligibility, attendance and pathway coordination for diabetic eye screening review; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports recording eligibility, attendance, prior pathway status, information sharing and coordination with primary care, diabetology, hospital eye and maternity services.

exact_section.heading: End-to-end pathway and information sharing
exact_section.locator: End-to-end pathway; section 1 Before screening test

investigations.text: Supports recording bilateral visual acuity, image status, grading, screening outcome and result letters sent to the person and relevant clinicians.
investigations.rationale: Supports bilateral acuity, image status, grading, outcome and result communication for diabetic eye screening review; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports recording bilateral visual acuity, image status, grading, screening outcome and result letters sent to the person and relevant clinicians.

investigations.text: Supports recording clinician-confirmed surveillance, ungradable-image, digital-surveillance or hospital-eye-service referral status without autonomously assigning a grade or destination.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Diabetes type and duration, pregnancy, prior eye disease, attendance, acuity, image status, grade, result, communication and follow-up are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for diabetic eye screening review.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
